title: Integrated survival model + tail risk into user-facing endpoints

observation.gap_identified: Survival model (Cox PH crash timing) and tail risk service (Sortino/Omega/Calmar) existed as standalone services but were not wired into any user-facing endpoints. Survival model was only used inside the crash prediction endpoint, not in market-status or stock analysis. Tail risk was only computed internally by stock_analyzer but had no dedicated endpoint for deep analysis.

implementation.feature_built: 3 integration points wired: (1) Survival model crash timing added to /api/market-status with Cox PH hazard rates at 3m/6m/12m + top risk factors, (2) New /api/analytics/tail-risk/{ticker} endpoint exposing institutional-grade tail risk metrics (Sortino, Omega, Calmar, Ulcer Index, tail concentration, win rate, profit factor), (3) New /api/analytics/survival-model endpoint for standalone Cox PH crash timing analysis, (4) Per-stock survival crash timing wired into /api/stock/{ticker} response (beta-adjusted), (5) Frontend API functions + TypeScript interfaces for both new endpoints

limitations: Survival model trains on-the-fly at each request (cached for 30 min) — could be pre-trained and serialized for faster cold starts
Tail risk endpoint fetches price data from yfinance — could reuse cached data from stock_analyzer
No new tests written specifically for the new endpoints (existing router tests cover the framework)
assessment.self_critique: Could have also wired the return_model service and peer_valuation service which are also orphaned. The survival model integration in stock analysis re-fetches market data which is redundant — ideally would share the data already fetched by _compute_market_signal(). Should write dedicated tests for the new endpoints.

next_steps: Write dedicated tests for /api/analytics/tail-risk and /api/analytics/survival-model endpoints
Wire return_model (quantile return predictor) into stock analysis or analytics router
Wire peer_valuation service (currently bypassed by relative_valuation)
Pre-train and cache survival model to avoid on-the-fly training overhead
Build frontend components to display survival crash timing and tail risk data
